summary: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block to CheffyPanel.astro <style> block, setting transition-duration: 0.01ms !important on #cheffy-panel and .cheffy-scrim (matching the Cheffy.astro sweep's duration). No other changes. About to verify with npm run build.
next: run npm run build to verify, then mark-awaiting-audit + enqueue-audit
